component.name: SKNode
component.summary: Base 2D sprite node with transform and matrix
component.details: Provides fundamental 2D transformation properties for sprite scene graph nodes. All sprite objects in the scene inherit from this component.
component.property: Source rectangle for sprite size and offset

component.name: SKScene
component.summary: Root container for a 2D sprite scene
component.details: Represents a complete 2D sprite scene that can be rendered to an SKView. Acts as the root node of the sprite scene hierarchy.

component.name: SKSpriteNode
component.summary: 2D sprite node that renders an image or animation
component.details: Renders 2D sprite content using either a static image or an animated sprite animation. Supports UV coordinates for sprite atlas sheets and various blend modes.
component.property: Primary sprite animation from a sprite atlas
Freeze animation at a specific frame index (-1 for normal playback)
UV texture coordinates for sprite atlas sampling

component.name: SKLabelNode
component.summary: 2D text label node for displaying text in sprite space
component.details: Renders text as a 2D sprite node that participates in the sprite scene hierarchy. Inherits text styling and layout from the TextBlockConcept.

component.name: SKView
component.summary: 2D viewport that renders an SKScene into the UI hierarchy
component.details: Acts as the bridge between the 2D UI system and the sprite scene hierarchy. Renders the attached SKScene using a 2D orthographic projection into its Node2D bounds.
component.property: Reference width for the sprite coordinate system
Reference height for the sprite coordinate system
